title: agrostis vaginata
intro: Agrostis vaginata, also known as silky hair grass, is a species of grass native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Agrostis vaginata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and promote relaxation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for use through infusions or decoctions, often made by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water.
